consts:
Score computation matching the official challenge metric.

Score = 100 · seg_distortion + sqrt(10 · pose_distortion) + 25 · rate

  - seg_distortion: from DistortionNet.compute_distortion (frozen SegNet)
  - pose_distortion: from DistortionNet.compute_distortion (frozen PoseNet)
  - rate: archive_bytes / sum(video file sizes) per challenge evaluate.py:65

Eval runs the decoder, bicubic-upsamples (384,512) outputs to (874,1164) camera
size, and calls DistortionNet.compute_distortion against the GT video.

Stream-decoded so we never hold all 1200 full-res frames in memory at once
(challenge frames at 1164×874×3 uint8 = ~3 MB each).
doc:
Score computation matching the official challenge metric.

Score = 100 · seg_distortion + sqrt(10 · pose_distortion) + 25 · rate

  - seg_distortion: from DistortionNet.compute_distortion (frozen SegNet)
  - pose_distortion: from DistortionNet.compute_distortion (frozen PoseNet)
  - rate: archive_bytes / sum(video file sizes) per challenge evaluate.py:65

Eval runs the decoder, bicubic-upsamples (384,512) outputs to (874,1164) camera
size, and calls DistortionNet.compute_distortion against the GT video.

Stream-decoded so we never hold all 1200 full-res frames in memory at once
(challenge frames at 1164×874×3 uint8 = ~3 MB each).

child_codes.name: _decoded_to_camera
child_codes.doc:
Resample (B*2, 3, EVAL_H, EVAL_W) -> (B*2, 3, CAMERA_H, CAMERA_W) bicubic.
Matches eval harness resample chain.
child_codes.dis:
27           RESUME                   0

 30           LOAD_GLOBAL              0 (F)
              LOAD_ATTR                2 (interpolate)
              PUSH_NULL
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW_LOAD_FAST_BORROW 1 (decoded_native, target_h)
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW         2 (target_w)
              BUILD_TUPLE              2

 31           LOAD_CONST               1 ('bicubic')
              LOAD_CONST               2 (False)

 30           LOAD_CONST               3 (('size', 'mode', 'align_corners'))
              CALL_KW                  4
              RETURN_VALUE

child_codes.name: evaluate_decoder
child_codes.doc:
Stream-decode the GT video and the decoder output simultaneously, accumulate
per-pair distortions via DistortionNet.compute_distortion.

Returns:
    dict with seg_distortion (mean), pose_distortion (mean)

  61           LOAD_FAST_BORROW         1 (f)
               LOAD_DEREF               4 (gt_pairs_iter_state)

               POP_TOP
               RETURN_VALUE

  58   L3:     END_FOR
               POP_ITER

  66           LOAD_CONST               3 (None)
               RETURN_VALUE

child_codes.name: compute_score
child_codes.doc: Final challenge metric. Lower is better.
child_codes.dis:
108           RESUME                   0

110           LOAD_FAST_BORROW_LOAD_FAST_BORROW 35 (archive_bytes, total_video_bytes)
              BINARY_OP               11 (/)
              STORE_FAST               4 (rate)

111           LOAD_CONST               1 (100.0)

              LOAD_CONST               3 (1e-12)

              CALL                     1
              STORE_FAST               6 (pose_component)

113           LOAD_CONST               4 (25.0)
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW         4 (rate)

              STORE_FAST               7 (rate_component)

115           LOAD_CONST               5 ('score')
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW_LOAD_FAST_BORROW 86 (seg_component, pose_component)
              BINARY_OP                0 (+)
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW         7 (rate_component)
              BINARY_OP                0 (+)

116           LOAD_CONST               6 ('seg_component')
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW         5 (seg_component)

117           LOAD_CONST               7 ('pose_component')

119           LOAD_CONST               9 ('seg_distortion')

120           LOAD_CONST              10 ('pose_distortion')

121           LOAD_CONST              11 ('rate')
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW         4 (rate)

122           LOAD_CONST              12 ('archive_bytes')
              LOAD_FAST_BORROW         2 (archive_bytes)

114           BUILD_MAP                8
              RETURN_VALUE

child_codes.name: total_video_bytes
child_codes.doc:
Rate denominator per challenge eval (evaluate.py:64): sum of source video
file sizes.
